metadata.vineyard_notes: Predominantly Premier and Grand Cru parcels in the Côte d'Or. Six wineries: Chablis, Beaune, Côte Chalonnaise, Mâconnais, Domaine Ferret, Beaujolais.
metadata.viticulture: Transitioning all Côte d'Or vineyards to organic certification (began 2021). Co-founded Cadus cooperage for oak sourcing control.
metadata.negociant_notes: Vinifies over 80% of négociant bottlings from purchased grapes. Approximately 80% of Premier and Grand Cru wines sourced from owned vineyards.

key_acquisitions.1985: Domaine Clair-Daü (Chambertin Clos de Bèze, Chapelle-Chambertin, Bonnes-Mares, Musigny, Clos Vougeot, Les Amoureuses, Clos St. Jacques)

metadata.oregon_project: Résonance Wines (Willamette Valley, est. 2013, headed by Thibault Gagey)

metadata.title: Technical Director of Winemaking
metadata.education: Engineering degree, Agronomic School of Montpellier; Oenologist's National Diploma (1999)

metadata.title: Senior Winemaker
metadata.notes: Over 30 years at Louis Jadot. Trained at Jadot, studied Oenology in Dijon.
Vines over 90 years old. Acquired with Clair-Daü purchase in 1985.

wines.name: Clos de la Roche Grand Cru

metadata.notes: Widely considered Grand Cru quality. Acquired with Clair-Daü purchase in 1985.
Widely considered Grand Cru quality. Acquired with Clair-Daü purchase in 1985.
Adjacent to Bonnes-Mares; often shows a more structured, Bonnes-Mares-like style

wines.name: Beaune Clos des Ursules Premier Cru

metadata.notes: Jadot's flagship Beaune. Monopole since 1826. Located within the larger Vignes Franches Premier Cru vineyard.

wines.name: Pommard Les Grands Epenots Premier Cru

metadata.notes: Vineyard is in Meursault but red wine is sold as Volnay Premier Cru

wines.name: Vosne-Romanée Les Beaux Monts Premier Cru
Beaune Grèves Le Clos Blanc Premier Cru

metadata.notes: Rare white Beaune Premier Cru from a small parcel within the Grèves vineyard

wines.name: Puligny-Montrachet Clos de la Garenne Premier Cru

metadata.notes: Acquired 1996. Moulin-à-Vent is the 'King of Beaujolais' — fullest, most age-worthy of the crus.

wines.name: Château des Jacques Moulin-à-Vent Clos de Rochegrès

metadata.notes: Single-vineyard bottling from the Château des Jacques estate
Top of the Mâconnais hierarchy. Jadot acquired Domaine J.A. Ferret in Pouilly-Fuissé in 2008.
One of the most powerful and age-worthy Nuits-Saint-Georges Premier Crus
